messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-508 — Pipeline board updated-at footer shows UK (Europe/London) time, DST-aware (BST/GMT), instead of UTC, with an explicit zone marker
What it solves: The board's footer renders "updated at MMM DD HH:MM" in UTC — formatUpdatedAtLabel
(extension/src/concierge/pipelineBoard.ts, ~L490) reads every field via getUTCMonth/getUTCDate/
getUTCHours/getUTCMinutes. The human reads the board on a UK phone and wants the update time in their
own wall-clock.
Approval context: Your second tweak 2026-07-17: "show the update time in UK time". The board's "updated at" footer is currently UTC; this renders it in UK (Europe/London) time instead, DST-aware — so it reads one hour ahead of UTC in summer (BST) and level with UTC in winter (GMT), handled automatically by the zone …
BL-508 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-508" (or "reject BL-508 <reason>") to act.
